statement: In every magma, Equation 3129 (`x = (((y * x) * z) * y) * w`) implies Equation 4082 (`x * x = ((y * x) * x) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0784
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) z) y) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op (op y x) x) z)
